title: Indulgent Shattering Filipino Pea-Eggplant Fritters
description: Indulgent Filipino dish made with pea-eggplant, featuring a shattering exterior and a rich umami flavor, all achieved without onions or garlic.

ingredients.name: pea-eggplant
ingredients.notes: any variety, preferably with a tender skin

ingredients.name: pork liver
ingredients.notes: you can use chicken liver if desired

instructions: Mash the pea-eggplant in a mortar and pestle until it's almost smooth.
Add the pork liver, fish sauce, black pepper, and salt to the mortar and mash until well combined.
Stir in the flour until the mixture is smooth.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the pea-eggplant mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until they're golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot with bok choy on the side, if desired.
